title: avoid the fog
content:
Guide book said best time to visit San Francisco is after September, so traveller can *avoid* the summer fog.

I immediately put the book down.

AVOID THE FOG?!?

The author must be joking. Or he might have never heard a song by Tony Bennett …

“The morning fog may chill the air, I don’t care …”

The fog is part of San Francisco! Go see the fog!! ;)
